targets.organisation: Queen's University Belfast Centre for Secure Information Technologies
targets.contact_route: CSIT / Queen's business and research partnership route
targets.source_evidence: CSIT describes challenge-led cyber security research, innovation programmes, industry engagement and Cyber-AI activity.
targets.ask: Assess whether CSIT can lead or route an ACTASAP academic validation project around Aureon Evidence OS for controlled AI evidence assurance.
required_reply_evidence: academic owner and validation work package

targets.organisation: Ulster University Artificial Intelligence Research Centre
targets.contact_route: Ulster University research and innovation / AIRC route
targets.source_evidence: Ulster AIRC describes AI theories, algorithms, tools and stakeholder/user engagement.
targets.ask: Assess whether Ulster can lead or route an ACTASAP academic validation project for Aureon Evidence OS.

targets.source_evidence: AICC describes a Queen's and Ulster partnership promoting AI awareness and responsible innovation with businesses in Northern Ireland.
targets.ask: Assess whether AICC can route R&A to an academic/business validation path for responsible AI workflow assurance.
required_reply_evidence: next funding route if ACTASAP is not viable

targets.source_evidence: The ADOPT Support Hub is listed for ADOPT applicants and projects, with email and phone support.
targets.ask: Advise how Aureon can support an England farm-led ADOPT project as evidence automation or facilitator support rather than direct lead.
required_reply_evidence: best next ADOPT round or contact

targets.contact_route: Innovative Farmers field lab / idea route
targets.source_evidence: Innovative Farmers describes a network of farmers and growers running on-farm trials.
targets.ask: Assess whether there is a farmer-led trial group where Aureon could support evidence capture, reporting and review for ADOPT.
required_reply_evidence: support work package and budget basis

targets.source_evidence: BOFIN says it is an approved Project Facilitator and supports farmers with ideas, partners and proposals.
targets.ask: Assess whether BOFIN can route Aureon into a farmer-led ADOPT project needing evidence automation support.
required_reply_evidence: Aureon support role and budget owner

targets.source_evidence: Farm Carbon Toolkit describes field labs and routes further information through Innovative Farmers.
targets.ask: Assess whether a farm carbon or field-lab evidence workflow could fit an ADOPT farm-led application.

targets.source_evidence: Innosuisse describes the bilateral Switzerland-UK call for Swiss and UK partners in joint R&D.
targets.ask: Advise how to identify an eligible Swiss implementation partner for the live UK-Swiss IFS draft.
required_reply_evidence: Swiss business or research partner route

targets.source_evidence: EEN Switzerland supports partner searches for research, innovation and business collaborations and lists een@innosuisse.ch.
targets.ask: Help locate Swiss partners for Aureon Evidence OS in the UK-Switzerland collaborative R&D route.

targets.source_evidence: The marketplace is described as a place to search and profile opportunities for UK-Switzerland collaborative R&D partner matching.
targets.ask: Use the marketplace route to find Swiss implementation partners aligned to engineering biology, semiconductors or eligible emerging technology fit.

targets.organisation: Innovate UK Business Connect European Programmes
targets.contact_route: IUK Business Connect European Programmes support route
targets.source_evidence: IUK Business Connect says businesses wanting help to find a project partner can contact its European Programmes team.
targets.ask: Advise partner-search and eligibility route for Aureon in the UK-Switzerland CR&D competition.

targets.organisation: Government Office for Technology Transfer Grant Fund team
targets.source_evidence: GOV.UK directs questions about GOTT funding to grantfund.gott@dsit.gov.uk.
targets.ask: Clarify whether Aureon can only support a public-sector research organisation lead for CKAF and how to find the right lead route.
required_reply_evidence: eligible public-sector research organisation lead route
procurement or support role options for Aureon

targets.organisation: UK Innovation and Science Seed Fund Knowledge Assets
targets.source_evidence: UKI2S describes work with GOTT to support spin-outs emerging from the public sector.
targets.ask: Assess whether Aureon could support public-sector knowledge-asset commercialisation as a service or evidence platform.

targets.source_evidence: GOV.UK lists APC contact info@apcuk.co.uk for DRIVE35 Scale-Up questions.
targets.ask: Advise whether Aureon evidence automation can fit DRIVE35 collaborative or scale-up projects as a consortium support work package.
required_reply_evidence: vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 lead route

targets.source_evidence: Wrightbus describes zero-emission vehicle leadership through hydrogen fuel cell and battery electric buses.
targets.ask: Assess whether a zero-emission bus or manufacturing evidence assurance work package could fit a DRIVE35 consortium.

targets.source_evidence: AMIC lists Belfast and Newtownabbey locations plus contact details, and describes advanced manufacturing engineering facilities.
targets.ask: Assess whether AMIC can route Aureon toward a ZEV manufacturing evidence or validation work package.

targets.organisation: Innovate UK Business Connect Transport team
targets.contact_route: IUK Business Connect Transport team route
targets.source_evidence: IUK Business Connect says applicants can contact its Transport team for advice on ZEVI2 electric power.
targets.ask: Advise partner-search route for Aureon evidence assurance support in ZEVI2 clean-maritime projects.

targets.source_evidence: The UK SHORE B2Match platform lists an Innovate UK Business Connect event contact for networking questions.
targets.ask: Use the UK SHORE network to locate maritime leads needing evidence automation, claim mapping or demonstration reporting.

targets.organisation: UK National Clean Maritime Research Hub
targets.source_evidence: The hub describes collaboration with stakeholders across the maritime sector to drive clean-maritime innovation and transformation.
targets.ask: Assess whether the hub can refer Aureon to clean-maritime partners needing evidence assurance or trial reporting support.

targets.source_evidence: NQCC engagement pages describe support for UK companies and researchers interested in quantum computing through SparQ and industry engagement.
targets.ask: Assess whether Aureon can support quantum hardware scaling evidence, test records or assurance workflows in an eligible consortium.
required_reply_evidence: eligible hardware lead or facility access

targets.source_evidence: UKNQT lists QCi3 as a hub bringing together investigators across 18 universities and gives engage.qci3@physics.ox.ac.uk as contact.
targets.ask: Assess whether QCi3 can route Aureon into a quantum hardware consortium needing evidence automation or reproducibility support.
required_reply_evidence: quantum hardware lead or academic route

targets.source_evidence: The QCA Cluster lists industry contacts and describes expertise across quantum hardware and software.
targets.ask: Assess whether a UK quantum hardware/software consortium could use Aureon for reproducible evidence and assurance workflows.

targets.source_evidence: OQC describes application-optimised quantum compute and invites contact with its team.
targets.ask: Assess whether Aureon could support quantum hardware scaling evidence, workflow traceability or validation reporting in a consortium.

controls: Targets are evidence-acquisition candidates, not partner commitments.
No external email, contact form, partner invitation, portal upload, or IFS submission was performed.
A target reply must supply route-specific lead, asset, permission, budget or work-package evidence before any IFS portal action.
Do not mark any covered route direct-submit-ready from this register alone.
Innovation Loans remains held outside the grant queue because it is repayable finance.
